fields.name: version

fields.name: progress_pct

computed.formula: COALESCE(SUM(kr.progress_pct * kr.weight) / NULLIF(SUM(kr.weight),0), 0) for objectives; ((current_value - start_value)/(target_value - start_value))*100 for metric KRs

fields.notes: Average of child KR progress percentages

fields.name: progress_pct

computed.formula: COALESCE(SUM(kr.progress_pct * kr.weight) / NULLIF(SUM(kr.weight),0), 0) for objectives; ((current_value - start_value)/(target_value - start_value))*100 for metric KRs

fields.formula: CASE kr_type WHEN metric: (current_value - start_value)/(target_value - start_value)*100 WHEN boolean: completed ? 100 : 0 WHEN milestone: milestone_progress_pct END

modules.name: OKRExplorer
modules.description: Browse and filter all OKRs across cycles and levels

modules.name: ObjectiveDetail
modules.description: Full objective detail with KRs, check-ins, and alignment

modules.name: AlignmentView
modules.description: Visual alignment map showing objective hierarchy

GET /api/objectives/:id.description: Get objective with KRs and child objectives

GET /api/objectives/tree.description: Get full OKR tree for cycle

DELETE /api/checkins/:id.description: Delete check-in (reverts KR to previous value)

events.name: checkin:created
events.description: Broadcast updated KR progress to team viewing same objective

events.name: objective:updated
events.description: Sync progress changes when KRs are checked in

events.name: kr:confidence_changed
events.description: Alert owner when confidence drops to at_risk or off_track

flows.name: Check In on Key Result
flows.trigger: Owner clicks Check In on KR
steps: Show CheckInForm with current value and previous check-in context
User enters new value, confidence status, and optional comment
Calculate new progress_pct based on kr_type formula
Recalculate parent objective.progress_pct as weighted average of KR progress
Broadcast checkin:created to viewers of same objective
If confidence dropped → notify objective owner

flows.name: Create Objective with Key Results
flows.trigger: User fills objective form and adds KRs
steps: Create each KeyResult linked to objective
If parent_objective_id set → establish alignment relationship
Notify owner if assigned to someone else

computed_fields.name: progress_pct (objective)
computed_fields.formula: SUM(kr.progress_pct * kr.weight) / SUM(kr.weight) for all non-deleted KRs

domain_rules: Each OKR cycle can have only one active designation at a time
Objective progress is the weighted average of its KR progress percentages
Check-in on a KR updates parent objective progress immediately
Individual-level OKRs must have an owner_id assigned
Company/department-level OKRs may align to no parent (they are root nodes)
Deleting a parent objective soft-deletes all child objectives and KRs
Stale KRs (no check-in in 7+ days) are flagged in reminder widget
Private objectives are visible only to owner, manager chain, and admins
generation_rules: OKR tree uses recursive CTE query: WITH RECURSIVE obj_tree AS ...
Objective progress recalculated server-side on every check-in; not client-computed
AlignmentMap uses D3.js force simulation or ELK.js hierarchical layout
Confidence status on objectives auto-computed from KR statuses unless manually overridden
Check-in history chart uses sparklines inline in KeyResultRow
Cycle switcher persists selection in localStorage and query params
Progress bars use CSS custom properties for smooth animated transitions
Stale check-in reminders queued via server-side cron job every Monday 9am

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
